business.name: Sparks Heating and Air
business.tagline: Reliable comfort when you need it most

hero.headline: Same-Day HVAC Service — *No Runaround*, Just Results
hero.subheadline: Denver's 5-star HVAC team fixes heating & cooling fast. 24/7 emergency response, upfront pricing, and maintenance plans that prevent breakdowns.

services_section.label: WHAT WE DO
services_section.heading: Complete HVAC Solutions for Denver Homes
services_section.subheading: From emergency repairs to preventive maintenance — we keep your family comfortable year-round.

services.title: Emergency AC & Heating Repair
services.description: Same-day service when your system fails. Our certified technicians diagnose fast and fix it right the first time — no return trips needed.

services.title: Complete System Installation
services.description: Energy-efficient furnaces, AC units, and heat pumps installed properly. We help you choose the right system for your home and budget.

services.title: Preventive Maintenance Plans
services.description: Seasonal tune-ups that catch problems before they become expensive repairs. Members get priority scheduling and exclusive discounts.

services.title: Indoor Air Quality Solutions
services.description: Air purifiers, humidifiers, and ductwork cleaning that improve your family's health and comfort while reducing energy costs.

about.heading: Denver's Trusted HVAC Experts Since 2015
about.body: We built Sparks Heating and Air on a simple promise: honest service, fair pricing, and solutions that last. Our certified technicians serve the entire Denver metro with same-day response and 24/7 emergency availability. No runaround, no surprises — just reliable comfort when you need it most.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Furnace died on a Sunday morning in January. Called Sparks and they had someone here within 2 hours. Fixed it fast and the price was exactly what they quoted — no hidden fees.

reviews.name: Mike D.
reviews.text: Been using their maintenance plan for 3 years. They caught a small issue last spring that could have been a huge expensive problem. Their techs actually explain what they're doing.

reviews.name: Jennifer L.
reviews.text: AC went out during the heat wave last summer. Sparks came same day, diagnosed the problem quickly, and had it running by evening. Professional and friendly service.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE
service_areas.heading: Serving the Greater Denver Metro
service_areas.subheading: Same-day service available throughout the Front Range communities.

cta.heading: Ready for Reliable HVAC Service?
cta.body: Don't wait for your system to fail. Get same-day service or schedule preventive maintenance that keeps your family comfortable year-round.
